/usr/bin/ar qc libvdb_simd.a CMakeFiles/vdb_simd.dir/src/simd/distance_l2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdb_simd.dir/src/simd/bit_unpack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdb_simd.dir/src/simd/prefix_sum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdb_simd.dir/src/simd/popcount.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdb_simd.dir/src/simd/transpose.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdb_simd.dir/src/simd/ip_exrabitq.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vdb_simd.dir/src/simd/fastscan.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvdb_simd.a
